_doc.description: Manual lat/lon overrides for DLD areas where Nominatim returns no match. Typically post-2021 off-plan communities not yet on OpenStreetMap.
_doc.policy: Coordinates are approximate (~community centroid). Accuracy ~1-2 km, sufficient for area-level dashboard pins. `source: 'manual_approximate'` lets dashboards filter if needed.
_doc.format: Key = DLD canonical area_name (must match areas.area_name exactly). Value = {lat, lon, source}.

Al Hebiah First.note: Arabian Ranches III (Emaar, 2021+). South of Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, between Mudon and Arabian Ranches 2.

Al Hebiah Sixth.note: DAMAC Lagoons (DAMAC, 2021+). Adjacent to DAMAC Hills, south of Hessa Street.
